name: frontier-eval emits both a markdown checklist and a json document
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --emit md 2>/dev/null | grep -q '# Frontier-model' && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/frontier-eval.sh" --emit json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"))' && echo h16-md-and-json 1>&2
